original_question:
Given sets $A=\{x| (x-2)(2x+1) \leqslant 0\}$ and $B=\{x| x < 1\}$, find the intersection of sets A and B.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}

similar_questions.question: Given sets $A=\{x| (x-3)(3x+2) \leqslant 0\}$ and $B=\{x| x < 2\}$, find the intersection of sets A and B.

Given sets $A=\{x| (x-5)(4x-3) \leqslant 0\}$ and $B=\{x| x < 3\}$, find the intersection of sets A and B.
Given sets $A=\{x| (x+1)(x-6) \leqslant 0\}$ and $B=\{x| x < 4\}$, find the intersection of sets A and B.
Given sets $A=\{x| (x-4)(2x-5) \leqslant 0\}$ and $B=\{x| x < 5\}$, find the intersection of sets A and B.
